specific_mechanism: new learnable Schur-functor module introducing new learnable tensor parameter and inter-head decomposition pathway (new computation graph edges)
llm_application: new learnable Schur-functor module: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new learnable tensor parameter) implementing new learnable Schur-functor module; the module adds inter-head decomposition pathway between existing layers, creating cross-attention bridge that the baseline lacks; module is NOT a function of existing parameters
